title: [DO NOT MERGE] Default ostree stub
body: This PR is only to test the integration of the changes of [PR 587 of c/image](https://github.com/containers/image/pull/587).

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1369) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@rhatdan The conversation has been going on in https://github.com/containers/image/pull/587 , let’s not fork it in here, please.
Thanks just want to get new data in each issue and PR.
Since no activity is happening over in containers/image since April, I am going to close this PR.  Reopen if you make progress.
